vehicles.title: Toyota corolla
vehicles.description:
This 2007 Toyota Corolla Fielder X

Wagon gives you the best of both worlds - compact size with surprising space inside. The 1.5-litre petrol engine is good on fuel for daily driving while slll having room for family needs, and even has a towbar for all your hauling needs!

- Only done 132,342km (may go up slightly as used daily) - New towbar

Roof racks included

Auto transmission with Normal/ Sports mode

Tinted rear windows

- Auto folding wing mirrors

Alloy mags NOT plasic hubcaps

- Kenwood sound system with Bluetooth conneclvity - Loads of cargo space

Normal chips and scrapes reflective of age

Reliable Japanese engineering - no mechanical issues, runs very smoothly.

WoF III 05/08/2026

Rego III 01/07/2026

You can't go wrong with a Toyota - very reliable and super economical 1.5L runabout.

Year: 2006

Seats: 5

Rego: Valid until 2 May 2026

Some paint peeling and minor dents due to age, but no mechanical issues. Drives well and very reliable.

Reason for selling: Returning to Japan.

Viewing available anywhere in Auckland. Message me if interested.
